full_text:
Cao Xing 曹性
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xing (曹性). Slain by Xiahou Dun in battle, who lost an eye to the archery of this man. Cao Xing was affiliated with Lu Bu. Cao Xing lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
